summary: Iteration 89: Tested Production Menu with 4 production options (Film, Serie TV, Anime, La Tua TV). All backend and frontend tests passed. Backend API /api/production-studios/unlock-status returns correct unlock status. Frontend production menu shows 2x2 grid with locked buttons (lock icons, gray styling) that navigate to /infrastructure. Unlocked Film button navigates to /create-film. Placeholder pages for locked routes show requirements correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production menu feature fully implemented and tested. User fandrex1@gmail.com has production_studio but NOT studio_serie_tv, studio_anime, or emittente_tv. Locked buttons redirect to /infrastructure, while Film button navigates to /create-film. Routes /create-series, /create-anime, /my-tv show locked placeholder pages with requirements.

Backend API Tests (pytest).test_03_sub_studios_locked_by_default: PASSED - All 3 sub-studios show as False
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_04_requirements_structure: PASSED - Requirements for studio_serie_tv (L12), studio_anime (L15), emittente_tv (L18)
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_05_studios_info_present: PASSED - Studios dict includes owned production_studio info

Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_01_login: PASSED - Successfully logged in to dashboard
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_02_mobile_bottom_nav: PASSED - Mobile bottom nav found with data-testid
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_03_produci_button: PASSED - Clicked Produci! button opens production menu
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_06_serie_tv_locked: PASSED - Serie TV button shows locked state + lock icon
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_07_anime_locked: PASSED - Anime button shows locked state
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_08_la_tua_tv_locked: PASSED - La Tua TV button shows locked state
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_10_locked_button_redirect: PASSED - Locked Serie TV button redirects to /infrastructure
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_11_click_outside_closes_menu: PASSED - Clicking outside closes the production menu
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_12_hamburger_menu_items: PASSED - Serie TV, Anime, La Tua TV found in hamburger menu
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_13_series_locked_page: PASSED - /create-series shows locked page with requirements (Level 12)
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_14_anime_locked_page: PASSED - /create-anime shows locked page with requirements (Level 15)
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_15_tv_locked_page: PASSED - /my-tv shows locked page with requirements (Level 18)
